title: InstCombine: Only propagate callsite attributes in sqrt->sqrtf
author: arsenm
description:
This was propagating the callee's attributes instead of just the
callsite. It's illegal to set denormal_fpenv on a callsite. This
was also losing callsite attributes which may have been more useful;
there's no point in setting the callee's attributes on the callsite.

tests.test_body:
; Function Attrs: nounwind ssp uwtable
define float @test3(ptr %v) #0 {
  %arrayidx13 = getelementptr inbounds float, ptr %v, i64 2
  %tmp14 = load float, ptr %arrayidx13, align 4
  %mul18 = fmul float %tmp14, %tmp14
  %add19 = fadd float undef, %mul18
  %conv = fpext float %add19 to double
  %call34 = call double @sqrt(double %conv) #1
  %call36 = call i32 @foo(double %call34) #2
  %conv38 = fptrunc double %call34 to float
  ret float %conv38
}

declare i32 @foo(double)

; Function Attrs: memory(none)
declare double @sqrt(double) #1

attributes #0 = { nounwind ssp uwtable }
attributes #1 = { memory(none) }
attributes #2 = { nounwind }
